MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT PETER KIM TRUONG , INDIVIDUALLY AND AS THE TRUSTEE OF THE PETER QUANG KIM TRUONG TRUST MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT;

is GRANTED with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts, not conclusions, supporting malice, oppression or fraud.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Anthony A. Trendacosta; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
